hero.title: 8500 Series
hero.subtitle: Delivering secure networking simplified — powered by the third-generation Quantum Flow Processor (QFP) ASIC for high throughput and enterprise-scale deployments.

texts: The 8500 Series Secure Routers deliver secure networking simplified. Powered by the third-generation Quantum Flow Processor (QFP) ASIC for high throughput and scale, these routers deliver robust, platform-level security, advanced performance engineering via routing and SD-WAN, and on-premises, infrastructure-as-code, or cloud management flexibility.

Each class of secure routers is designed to deliver risk reduction, enhanced reliability, and future readiness. The platform supports multi-layer defense strategies and integrates natively with enterprise security ecosystems.

blocks.title: Key differentiator
blocks.text: Purpose-built for data center and colocation environments, offering massive scalability and granular traffic optimization. With support for high-throughput workloads, physical guardrails, and advanced automation, the 8500 Series keeps infrastructure fast, secure, and future ready.

texts: Purpose-built for data center and colocation environments, the 8500 Series offers massive scalability and granular traffic optimization across distributed enterprise networks.

cards.title: High-Throughput Performance
cards.desc: Third-gen QFP ASIC delivers unmatched forwarding rates for demanding enterprise workloads.

cards.title: Platform-Level Security
cards.desc: Hardware trust anchors, Secure Boot, and runtime integrity checking across the stack.

cards.title: SD-WAN & Routing
cards.desc: Native SD-WAN with advanced routing for application-aware path selection.

cards.title: Cloud & On-Prem Management
cards.desc: Infrastructure-as-code and cloud-native APIs for scalable operations.

blocks.asideText: Ideal for large enterprises, cloud providers, financial institutions, and national operators requiring carrier-grade reliability.
blocks.intro: The 8500 Series is engineered for mission-critical deployments across diverse enterprise environments:
list: Secure WAN aggregation for high-performance, scalable routing
Data center interconnect (DCI) with high bandwidth and low latency
Edge services aggregation at strategic edge points
SD-WAN hub consolidation for centralized policy enforcement
Multi-cloud connectivity with consistent security policy

texts: Layered defense from hardware root of trust through application-layer inspection.

items: Cryptographically signed boot chain from hardware to OS
Tamper-evident hardware and runtime integrity monitoring
Advanced threat detection with flow telemetry
Role-based access control with AAA integration

texts: Select the right 8500 Series model for your deployment:

rows: NETCONF/YANG, gRPC, REST API, SNMP, CLI

texts: The 8500 Series runs IOS XR — a distributed, modular OS for service provider and enterprise networks.

items: Model-driven programmability via YANG and NETCONF/gRPC
Automated lifecycle management with zero-touch provisioning
In-service software upgrade (ISSU) for non-disruptive updates

texts: Built for modern DevOps and NetOps workflows.

cards.title: Ansible & Terraform
cards.desc: Native modules for infrastructure-as-code and drift prevention.

All 8500 Series hardware is covered under a limited hardware warranty with advance replacement options.

items: Limited lifetime warranty on chassis and fixed-configuration models
90-day software warranty covering defects in media and documentation
